paragraphs: Perps tape 25/25 NEUTRAL across the assessed universe. PROVE funding repaired from -0.037% to +0.0002% between prefetches, pulling the asset out of CAPITULATION even as price held -11.52%. NEAR's morning rip booked at the gate, the +151% 7d OI stack now +37% 24h adds on top. Funding muted universe-wide on a tape still rotating.

AI agents plus Decentralized compute plus RWA all 5/5 PEAK · RIDE. Hyperliquid and Privacy/ZK both FADING. F&G 28 Fear day 2, breadth 7/20 24h on a 5/20 7d frame. AIXBT names BTC's $73K flush target with $2B coordinated selling and ETF outflows as the mechanism.

Alt rotation real but selective. NEAR holds the +14% 24h while HYPE rolls -0.9% on funding flipping negative. BSB capitulated -42.5% on the unwind yesterday's watchlist named. Smart money trimming across the AI/DePIN front.
market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · ride the three open longs into PEAK trail. Fade short setups patiently — EDEN parabolic continues, ZEC trigger at $620 close approaches.

current_positions.thesis_note: AI agents plus DePIN both 5/5 PEAK · RIDE, top L/S slipping to -0.02 over 7d but not breaking, invalidation $2.05 sits 7% below current
current_positions.watch: BTC flushes below $76K, OR NEAR breaks $2.10 entry zone on volume past 1.5x 24h avg

current_positions.thesis_note: Narrative FADE day 4, funding flipped to -0.008% from positive between prefetches, top L/S still +0.13 over 7d, ETF inflow $30M first-week intact
current_positions.invalidation: close below $56, OR clean break below the post-June-6-unlock settlement low
current_positions.watch: second funding tick negative with top L/S delta turning down, OR close below $58 entry zone

current_positions.thesis_note: RWA 5/5 PEAK trail, top L/S -0.22 over 7d but +5.5% OI add 24h holds the bid, trending #6 a second day
current_positions.watch: top L/S falls under 1.50, OR break of $0.43 entry zone on volume past 1.5x 24h avg

watchlist.trigger: top L/S turns up through 1.10 OR funding holds negative on another vol-multiple day with pct_24h past +10%
watchlist.thesis: Vol 13.54x with short-liq cascade 11.5x p75. Funding -0.002%/8h on rising price reads as short pile-in. DePIN 5/5 PEAK. pct_24h decelerated from +6.96% morning to +3.72%, top L/S sits flat at 1.10 with -0.20 over 7d — retail-led, not smart-money-confirmed.

watchlist.trigger: taker buy clean through 52% with OI continuing to build OR pct_24h breaks +10% with funding holding under +0.02%/8h
watchlist.invalidation: close below $275 OR funding flips negative
watchlist.thesis: Yesterday's ACCUMULATION print rolled to NEUTRAL on pct_4h -3.71% intraday weakness. OI +4.57% 24h, funding +0.007%/8h still above 7d avg. Top L/S 1.90 with +0.06 over 7d holds. AI compute 5/5 PEAK. Setup weakening — needs taker buy through 52% to re-fire.

watchlist.trigger: OI flips negative on a red day (oi_24h_pct < 0 with pct_24h < 0) — fires CAPITULATION per perps-scan
watchlist.thesis: Parabolic continued — +24.05% 24h on OI +13.55%. Top L/S 1.19 with -0.61 over 7d, the smart-money exit deepens. Funding flipped clean positive +0.007%/8h off the -0.025% 7d avg. Basis -0.099% still negative — spot exit pressure into the leverage stack.

watchlist.trigger: close below $620 OR top L/S falls under 0.75
watchlist.thesis: Privacy/ZK FADING day 4, mindshare 2/5. Second drawdown session, -4.99% 24h to $630.78. Top L/S 0.82 with -0.12 over 7d, the short trade is partially priced. Trigger at $620 sits $10.78 below close — one red session away.

watchlist.trigger: pct_24h breaks +20% with vol clean past 2.0x average (fires CATALYST-BREAKOUT) OR top L/S delta turns positive over 7d
watchlist.invalidation: close below $0.27 (break of today's range and 7d open)
watchlist.thesis: Token-call HIGH 9/10. Funding repaired from -0.035% 7d avg to +0.008%/8h, short liqs $730K vs p75 $284K = 2.6x cascade. OI +16.34% 24h. Eightco 8.39% of circulating supply is the largest known institutional holder, Altman won the OpenAI vs Musk verdict 18 May. AI identity sub-narrative inside AI/DePIN PEAK. Missed CATALYST-BREAKOUT by 10.2pp on pct_24h gate.

evaluations.note: Day 1 second eval. -5.21% from fire, +151% 7d OI stack now +37% 24h add. Top L/S 1.73 with -0.02 over 7d weakened from morning +0.08 but not breaking. Invalidation $2.05 sits 7% below.

Day 1 second eval. -4.64% from fire. Funding flipped from +0.0067% to -0.0082% between prefetches — bearish signal but OI -2.59% 24h means leverage book deflating, not aggressive shorts piling in. Top L/S still +0.13 over 7d. Invalidation $56 sits 3.58% below.

Day 1 second eval. -4.25% from fire. Range broke past 25% accumulation gate on the breakout — bullish resolution. Top L/S 1.77 with -0.22 over 7d, RWA 5/5 PEAK still holds. Invalidation $0.41 sits 7.5% below.

add_watchlist.invalidation: close below $0.27 (break of today's range and 7d open)
